title: Taris Chamber of Commerce

{{Quote|The biggest of the bounties was guaranteed by the Taris Chamber of Commerce, which, last this reporter heard, was in danger of some serious Mandalorian redecoration. You can't very well cough up the credits with a bomb dropped in your lobby!|Krav Noblis|<ref name="adjudicator" />}}
The '''Taris Chamber of Commerce''' was an institution located on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]]. The Taris Chamber of Commerce guaranteed the largest of nine [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] placed on the head of [[Zayne Carrick]], a former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] accused of [[Padawan Massacre|murdering]] his classmates. However, by [[3963 BBY]], Taris was [[Taris Siege|under siege]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans, the Chamber of Commerce was in danger of attack, and the status of their guarantee was uncertain. This development was reported on by editor [[Krav Noblis]] in the [[Holofeed/Legends|Holofeed]] ''[[The Adjudicator]]''.<ref name="adjudicator" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Taris Chamber of Commerce was first mentioned in ''[[The Adjudicator Special Report: The Outer Rim]]'', an in-universe newsletter appearing on the last page of the [[Knights of the Old Republic 14|fourteenth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series. The issue was written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="adjudicator" /> on [[February 28]], [[2007]].<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/14-395/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-14|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #14}}</ref>
